curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The patch changes the default value of allow_pickle from True to False in numpy.lib.npyio.load() and numpy.lib.format.read_array(). These are the two primary entry points for loading serialized array data. The NpzFile.__init__ constructor was also patched but is an internal implementation detail called by load(). Only 2 non-test source files were modified, so the patch is not noisy.
